title: Bigshot
description: Allows you to take big, high quality screenshots.
body:
This mod lets you take higher resolution screenshots, notably, in resolutions 2x, 3x and 4x bigger resolution than your screen size.

You can take the screenshots using one of the 3 new keybinds that the mod adds:
![Keybinds](https://assets.blamejared.com/bigshot/keybinds.png)

Here are some examples of the different resolutions of screenshots:

[1x resolution (2560x1377) (4.2MB)](https://assets.blamejared.com/bigshot/1x.png)

[2x resolution (5120x2754) (15.8MB)](https://assets.blamejared.com/bigshot/2x.png)

[3x resolution (7680x4131) (34.1MB)](https://assets.blamejared.com/bigshot/3x.png)

[4x resolution (10240x5508) (56.4MB)](https://assets.blamejared.com/bigshot/4x.png)



If you would like to support me in my modding endeavors, you can become a patron via **[![Patreon logo](https://i.imgur.com/CAJuExT.png) Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/jaredlll08)**.
